title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker21: messages.py
close_reason: Fixed merge conflict and vector-incompatible announce/messages.py in worker21 worktree by adopting canonical CCP-9 rx_channel placement (byte 1 in flags, 93-byte fixed length) matching independent oracle in test/vectors/generate.py and spec. Also resolved leftover merge marker in test_bridge_zephyr_cmake.py by including both obsolete board aliases. Verified with git commit 604d1f6.
